_note: Elemental affinity is resolved from canonical JobData plus all seven target equipment slots; unit+0x52..+0x56 remains non-authoritative and is not consumed by these formulas.

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetAbsorbResolved
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && (mapOr(dclJobAbsorbFire, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.absorb_fire || tslot.body.absorb_fire || tslot.accessory.absorb_fire || tslot.rightweapon.absorb_fire || tslot.rightshield.absorb_fire || tslot.leftweapon.absorb_fire || tslot.leftshield.absorb_fire)) || (dcl.elementIce && (mapOr(dclJobAbsorbIce, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.absorb_ice || tslot.body.absorb_ice || tslot.accessory.absorb_ice || tslot.rightweapon.absorb_ice || tslot.rightshield.absorb_ice || tslot.leftweapon.absorb_ice || tslot.leftshield.absorb_ice)) || (dcl.elementLightning && (mapOr(dclJobAbsorbLightning, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.absorb_lightning || tslot.body.absorb_lightning || tslot.accessory.absorb_lightning || tslot.rightweapon.absorb_lightning || tslot.rightshield.absorb_lightning || tslot.leftweapon.absorb_lightning || tslot.leftshield.absorb_lightning)) || (dcl.elementWind && (mapOr(dclJobAbsorbWind, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.absorb_wind || tslot.body.absorb_wind || tslot.accessory.absorb_wind || tslot.rightweapon.absorb_wind || tslot.rightshield.absorb_wind || tslot.leftweapon.absorb_wind || tslot.leftshield.absorb_wind)) || (dcl.elementEarth && (mapOr(dclJobAbsorbEarth, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.absorb_earth || tslot.body.absorb_earth || tslot.accessory.absorb_earth || tslot.rightweapon.absorb_earth || tslot.rightshield.absorb_earth || tslot.leftweapon.absorb_earth || tslot.leftshield.absorb_earth)) || (dcl.elementWater && (mapOr(dclJobAbsorbWater, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.absorb_water || tslot.body.absorb_water || tslot.accessory.absorb_water || tslot.rightweapon.absorb_water || tslot.rightshield.absorb_water || tslot.leftweapon.absorb_water || tslot.leftshield.absorb_water)))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetNullResolved
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && (mapOr(dclJobNullFire, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.nullify_fire || tslot.body.nullify_fire || tslot.accessory.nullify_fire || tslot.rightweapon.nullify_fire || tslot.rightshield.nullify_fire || tslot.leftweapon.nullify_fire || tslot.leftshield.nullify_fire)) || (dcl.elementIce && (mapOr(dclJobNullIce, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.nullify_ice || tslot.body.nullify_ice || tslot.accessory.nullify_ice || tslot.rightweapon.nullify_ice || tslot.rightshield.nullify_ice || tslot.leftweapon.nullify_ice || tslot.leftshield.nullify_ice)) || (dcl.elementLightning && (mapOr(dclJobNullLightning, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.nullify_lightning || tslot.body.nullify_lightning || tslot.accessory.nullify_lightning || tslot.rightweapon.nullify_lightning || tslot.rightshield.nullify_lightning || tslot.leftweapon.nullify_lightning || tslot.leftshield.nullify_lightning)) || (dcl.elementWind && (mapOr(dclJobNullWind, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.nullify_wind || tslot.body.nullify_wind || tslot.accessory.nullify_wind || tslot.rightweapon.nullify_wind || tslot.rightshield.nullify_wind || tslot.leftweapon.nullify_wind || tslot.leftshield.nullify_wind)) || (dcl.elementEarth && (mapOr(dclJobNullEarth, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.nullify_earth || tslot.body.nullify_earth || tslot.accessory.nullify_earth || tslot.rightweapon.nullify_earth || tslot.rightshield.nullify_earth || tslot.leftweapon.nullify_earth || tslot.leftshield.nullify_earth)) || (dcl.elementWater && (mapOr(dclJobNullWater, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.nullify_water || tslot.body.nullify_water || tslot.accessory.nullify_water || tslot.rightweapon.nullify_water || tslot.rightshield.nullify_water || tslot.leftweapon.nullify_water || tslot.leftshield.nullify_water)))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetHalveResolved
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && (mapOr(dclJobHalveFire, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.halve_fire || tslot.body.halve_fire || tslot.accessory.halve_fire || tslot.rightweapon.halve_fire || tslot.rightshield.halve_fire || tslot.leftweapon.halve_fire || tslot.leftshield.halve_fire)) || (dcl.elementIce && (mapOr(dclJobHalveIce, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.halve_ice || tslot.body.halve_ice || tslot.accessory.halve_ice || tslot.rightweapon.halve_ice || tslot.rightshield.halve_ice || tslot.leftweapon.halve_ice || tslot.leftshield.halve_ice)) || (dcl.elementLightning && (mapOr(dclJobHalveLightning, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.halve_lightning || tslot.body.halve_lightning || tslot.accessory.halve_lightning || tslot.rightweapon.halve_lightning || tslot.rightshield.halve_lightning || tslot.leftweapon.halve_lightning || tslot.leftshield.halve_lightning)) || (dcl.elementWind && (mapOr(dclJobHalveWind, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.halve_wind || tslot.body.halve_wind || tslot.accessory.halve_wind || tslot.rightweapon.halve_wind || tslot.rightshield.halve_wind || tslot.leftweapon.halve_wind || tslot.leftshield.halve_wind)) || (dcl.elementEarth && (mapOr(dclJobHalveEarth, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.halve_earth || tslot.body.halve_earth || tslot.accessory.halve_earth || tslot.rightweapon.halve_earth || tslot.rightshield.halve_earth || tslot.leftweapon.halve_earth || tslot.leftshield.halve_earth)) || (dcl.elementWater && (mapOr(dclJobHalveWater, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.halve_water || tslot.body.halve_water || tslot.accessory.halve_water || tslot.rightweapon.halve_water || tslot.rightshield.halve_water || tslot.leftweapon.halve_water || tslot.leftshield.halve_water)))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetWeakResolved
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && ((mapOr(dclJobWeakFire, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.weak_fire || tslot.body.weak_fire || tslot.accessory.weak_fire || tslot.rightweapon.weak_fire || tslot.rightshield.weak_fire || tslot.leftweapon.weak_fire || tslot.leftshield.weak_fire || t.status.oil))) || (dcl.elementIce && (mapOr(dclJobWeakIce, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.weak_ice || tslot.body.weak_ice || tslot.accessory.weak_ice || tslot.rightweapon.weak_ice || tslot.rightshield.weak_ice || tslot.leftweapon.weak_ice || tslot.leftshield.weak_ice)) || (dcl.elementLightning && (mapOr(dclJobWeakLightning, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.weak_lightning || tslot.body.weak_lightning || tslot.accessory.weak_lightning || tslot.rightweapon.weak_lightning || tslot.rightshield.weak_lightning || tslot.leftweapon.weak_lightning || tslot.leftshield.weak_lightning)) || (dcl.elementWind && (mapOr(dclJobWeakWind, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.weak_wind || tslot.body.weak_wind || tslot.accessory.weak_wind || tslot.rightweapon.weak_wind || tslot.rightshield.weak_wind || tslot.leftweapon.weak_wind || tslot.leftshield.weak_wind)) || (dcl.elementEarth && (mapOr(dclJobWeakEarth, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.weak_earth || tslot.body.weak_earth || tslot.accessory.weak_earth || tslot.rightweapon.weak_earth || tslot.rightshield.weak_earth || tslot.leftweapon.weak_earth || tslot.leftshield.weak_earth)) || (dcl.elementWater && (mapOr(dclJobWeakWater, t.jobId, 0) || tslot.head.weak_water || tslot.body.weak_water || tslot.accessory.weak_water || tslot.rightweapon.weak_water || tslot.rightshield.weak_water || tslot.leftweapon.weak_water || tslot.leftshield.weak_water)))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.targetStrongResolved
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: dcl.isElemental && ((dcl.elementFire && (tslot.head.strong_fire || tslot.body.strong_fire || tslot.accessory.strong_fire || tslot.rightweapon.strong_fire || tslot.rightshield.strong_fire || tslot.leftweapon.strong_fire || tslot.leftshield.strong_fire)) || (dcl.elementIce && (tslot.head.strong_ice || tslot.body.strong_ice || tslot.accessory.strong_ice || tslot.rightweapon.strong_ice || tslot.rightshield.strong_ice || tslot.leftweapon.strong_ice || tslot.leftshield.strong_ice)) || (dcl.elementLightning && (tslot.head.strong_lightning || tslot.body.strong_lightning || tslot.accessory.strong_lightning || tslot.rightweapon.strong_lightning || tslot.rightshield.strong_lightning || tslot.leftweapon.strong_lightning || tslot.leftshield.strong_lightning)) || (dcl.elementWind && (tslot.head.strong_wind || tslot.body.strong_wind || tslot.accessory.strong_wind || tslot.rightweapon.strong_wind || tslot.rightshield.strong_wind || tslot.leftweapon.strong_wind || tslot.leftshield.strong_wind)) || (dcl.elementEarth && (tslot.head.strong_earth || tslot.body.strong_earth || tslot.accessory.strong_earth || tslot.rightweapon.strong_earth || tslot.rightshield.strong_earth || tslot.leftweapon.strong_earth || tslot.leftshield.strong_earth)) || (dcl.elementWater && (tslot.head.strong_water || tslot.body.strong_water || tslot.accessory.strong_water || tslot.rightweapon.strong_water || tslot.rightshield.strong_water || tslot.leftweapon.strong_water || tslot.leftshield.strong_water)))

DclDerivedVariables.Name: dcl.elementPermilleResolved
DclDerivedVariables.Formula: if(dcl.targetNullResolved, 0, if(dcl.targetHalveResolved, const.dclAffinityHalvePermille, if(dcl.targetWeakResolved, const.dclAffinityWeakPermille, if(dcl.targetStrongResolved, const.dclAffinityStrongPermille, 1000))))
